headline: A Look At Campbell Soup (CPB) Valuation After Earnings Beat Tariff And Inflation Headwinds
summary: Campbell's (CPB) stock was in focus after the company reported quarterly earnings that surpassed Wall Street expectations, with 1% sales growth and earnings beating forecasts despite ongoing tariff and inflation pressures. See our latest analysis for Campbell's. Even with the earnings beat and a reaffirmed quarterly dividend of US$0.39 per share, Campbell's share price is down 26.8% over the past three months and the 1 year total shareholder return has declined 39.3%. This points to fading...
